# מוריה ביטוח — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Moria Insurance is a personal insurance agency specializing in life and health insurance, where the client is at the heart of everything. The agency positions itself against impersonal or cheap-looking alternatives by emphasizing trust, professional claims handling, and genuine care for policyholders — especially at the critical moment when they need to use their coverage. The brand voice is warm, reassuring, and client-first, stressing that real value is proven not at the point of sale, but when it truly matters.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://moria-bituach.zappy5.app
מוריה ביטוח – סוכנות ביטוח אישית שמציבה אתכם במרכז. ביטוח חיים, בריאות ומחלות קשות עם ליווי מקצועי אמיתי ברגע שחשוב. קבלו הצעה עכשיו.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About מוריה ביטוח
Moria Insurance is a personal insurance agency specializing in life and health insurance, where the client is at the heart of everything. The agency positions itself against impersonal or cheap-looking alternatives by emphasizing trust, professional claims handling, and genuine care for policyholders — especially at the critical moment when they need to use their coverage. The brand voice is warm, reassuring, and client-first, stressing that real value is proven not at the point of sale, but when it truly matters.

## Services/Products
- ביטוח חיים
- ביטוח בריאות

## Target Audience
לקוחות המחפשים ביטוח חיים ובריאות

## Industry
ביטוח
